channel.title: Comments for page "The Morality of Insects"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "The Morality of Insects"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I love the creativity of this format. The dialogue is a bit stilted in some places, but I can get past that. This scenario is pretty good.

+1

Just a note: it doesn’t look like the image is locally hosted on the page.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: While I'm a bit skeptical about someone the Foundation put in charge of such a critical organization losing it on national TV, I do think this was well written and the formatting was excelling. Ergo, +1
